[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000111 3
1 0011010110 5
2 0011010111 6
3 0100110000 3
4 1011110000 5
5 0011011110 6
6 1011111100 7
7 0101010001 4
